summary: Iteration 125 testing completed. Code quality fixes validated - all refactored APIs working correctly. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Stock Trading, AI Insights, Trust Distribution pages working. The AST-based safe arithmetic parser in scenario_templates.py correctly evaluates formulas like 'current_age + 2'. Buffett Engine returns live stock data. Risk Control, Workflow, and Xplan APIs all functional.

issues: Recharts warning: chart width/height -1 - needs minWidth/minHeight set (known issue from iteration 123-124)

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality fixes successfully applied - eval() replaced with AST-based parser, array-index-as-key patterns fixed, useCallback hooks added, sessionStorage for client_token, useMemo for filter/map operations, console.log statements removed
test_credentials: No auth needed - all endpoints are open
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 125 focused on code quality fixes from automated report. All changes are refactoring and security hardening - no new features. Key validations: (1) Scenario templates API with AST-based _safe_eval_arithmetic works correctly - formulas like 'current_age + 2' evaluate properly, (2) Buffett Engine returns live stock data, (3) Risk Control, Workflow, Xplan APIs all functional, (4) Frontend pages (Stock Trading, AI Insights, Trust Distribution) render correctly. Known issue: Recharts chart width/height -1 warning persists from previous iterations.
